title: phyllanthus tenellus var. tenellus
intro: Phyllanthus tenellus var. tenellus, also known as Cheesewood or Green Chanca Piedra, is a small, shrub-like plant native to tropical and subtropical regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Phyllanthus tenellus var. tenellus include its ability to treat kidney stones, gallstones, and other urinary tract issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, tonics, and other medicinal concoctions.
